# IOVI Docs

Use these docs to operate the current IOVI semantic-layer playground and middleware APIs.

Branding note: IOVI is the current product/docs surface. Some protocol package names, environment variables, and legacy sandbox hostnames still use EON during the rebrand.

Core rule: canonicity is shared, validity is sovereign. EON base-layer UTXOs order and store opaque scalar Data. Semantic layers define and verify their own state transitions.

Safe wording: operator posts UTXO, wallet owns semantic state.

Primary task pages:
- /api/
- /api/payment-sl/
- /agents/agent-quickstart/
- /agents/smoke-test/
- /agents/task-recipes/
- /concepts/mental-model/
- /concepts/utxo-data-bus/
- /guides/payment-sl-end-to-end/
- /guides/verifier-sync/
- /openapi/payment-sl.openapi.json
- /openapi/generic-verifier.openapi.json
- /openapi/bundler-engine.openapi.json
- /openapi/marketplace-bundler.openapi.json
- /openapi/base-layer.openapi.json

Live playground:
https://iovi-payment-sl-playground.vercel.app/

Default public services:
PAYMENT_SL=https://eon-payment-sl-demo-production.up.railway.app
VERIFIER=https://verifier-production-7dc3.up.railway.app
BUNDLER_MARKETPLACE=https://bundler-production-b637.up.railway.app
BASE_LAYER=https://iovi-api-production.up.railway.app

Service ownership:
PAYMENT_SL owns wallet registry, semantic-layer registry, actions, operator batching, devnet submission, and embedded sandbox verifier reads.
VERIFIER owns generic normalized base-layer event ingestion and accepted generic semantic-layer state.
BUNDLER_MARKETPLACE owns bundle wrapping, AMM quote, swap, and settlement payload APIs.
BASE_LAYER owns wallet address, balance, UTXO, transaction, and transfer-with-Data APIs.

sl_id values must be hex strings. Use 00010001 for the default Payment SL or a unique hex lane such as a9bca654 for tests.

Canonical Payment SL flow:
PAYMENT_SL POST /wallets
PAYMENT_SL POST /operator/init
PAYMENT_SL POST /semantic-layers
PAYMENT_SL POST /actions/mint
PAYMENT_SL POST /operator/batch
PAYMENT_SL POST /verifier/accept-latest-batch
PAYMENT_SL GET /balances/{address}
PAYMENT_SL POST /actions/transfer
PAYMENT_SL POST /operator/batch
PAYMENT_SL POST /verifier/accept-latest-batch
PAYMENT_SL GET /verifier/state
PAYMENT_SL GET /verifier/log

Devnet-backed Payment SL flow:
PAYMENT_SL POST /devnet/submit-latest-batch
PAYMENT_SL POST /verifier/sync
Poll until the target batch has verification_source=devnet_utxo.

Custom asset lane rule:
Create the semantic-layer registry record before PAYMENT_SL POST /semantic-layers/{sl_id}/assets.
GET /health is service-level readiness, not lane-level initialization.

Do not treat operator state as final. Prefer verifier reads for accepted wallet state.
Do not invent hosted URLs. Use the public URLs above unless the user supplies their own deployment.
